title: Wrapped signs
description: Changes the Farmers Delight signs to be pixel consistent and also borderless (just pixel consistent signs are also available)
body:
# Wrapped signs
This is a tiny little pack that changes the canvas signs from [Farmers Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) to be pixel consistent, as well as making the canvas look like it was wrapped around the sign

### Warning:
the pixel consistent signs cause the text to clip into the border, so be aware of that
### Credits:
The vanilla signs come from

[Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)

although are slightly modified
